canonical_prompt: Jackery-style portable power station JE-1000F at a clean outdoor campsite, realistic product photography, product fully visible, natural daylight, generous negative space for manual layout
negative_constraints: no text, no logos, no QR codes, no altered ports, no extra buttons, no invented accessories
notes: 候选生成素材；生成结果必须先登记为候选，不能直接进入发布。

negative_constraints: no language text baked into the artwork; preserve exact product geometry and LED/button positions
notes: 来自原始 AI 的文字化操作步骤；属于设计重绘，不交给生图工具猜测。

negative_constraints: no invented digits, symbols, ports, or product geometry
notes: 原始 AI 印刷页 05 的 LCD DISPLAY；生图工具只可用于构图参考，不得生成可交付图。
